name: SomeIpProvidedEventRemoveConsumer
title: SomeIpProvidedEventRemoveConsumer
syntax: long SomeIpProvidedEventRemoveConsumer(dword pevHandle, dword remoteIPv4Address, dword remoteUDPPort, dword remoteTCPPort);
description: Removes a consumer from a provided event that has been added by SomeIpProvidedEventAddConsumer.

parameters.name: pevHandle
parameters.description: Provided event handle (may be retrieved by SomeIpGetProvidedObjectHandle)
